推荐场景: 便利店门口｜判断 next to / near
60秒任务: 「在旁边」：地点/方向/路线判断；A=礼貌短句/正确动作；B=表达生硬/动作错翻车。
目标功能: 问地点｜方向指令｜路线理解｜地点关系｜远近判断
场景族: 街道｜地铁站｜公交站｜出租车｜机场/车站
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
It's next to ___.（在旁边）
It's near ___.（在附近）
It's in front of ___.（在前面）
It's behind ___.（在后面）
It's between ___ and ___.（在两者之间）
It's across from ___.（在对面）
Is it next to the cafe?（确认旁边）
Is it near the station?（确认附近）
The bank is next to the hotel.（说明位置）
The shop is behind the cafe.（说明位置）
Look near the door.（提示寻找）
Go past the bank.（经过银行）
It's very near.（很近）
I found it.（找到）
Thank you.（感谢）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: cafe, bank, hotel, station, bus stop, shop, door, street, map, park
Verbs: look, find, go, pass, stand, show
Place: next to, near, in front of, behind, between, across from
Chunks: next to ___, near the station, behind the cafe, between ___ and ___, very near
